messages.index.aboutMe.title: About TangMo
messages.index.aboutMe.imageCaption: TangMo often use da defauwt “Anemo” dwagon avataw in VWChat
messages.index.aboutMe.para: Hewwo! It’s TangMo fwom Thaiwand, wiving faw fwom home. Da name witewawwy twanswates to “watewmewon”. I’d be happy to chat about stuff fwom tech, photogwaphy, to daiwy dose of fuwwy memes. I spend a wot of time on VWChat, usuawwy as da defauwt “Anemo” avataw (pictuwed). See ya awound!
messages.index.aboutChara.title: About da chawactew
messages.index.aboutChara.imageAlt: Bust shot painting of TangMo’s chawactew
messages.index.aboutChara.para: Yet anuthew bwue wowf among 23,547 othews in da fandom. He… exists…? I just put him in dwawings sometimes.

messages.contact.title: Tawk to me!
messages.bookingApp.booking.title: Book My Body!
messages.bookingApp.booking.intro: Want to pway with me? Pewhaps in pwivate? Wequest booking hewe!
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_info: What do uu want to do to me uwu?
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_notice: Once uu submit da fowm, I wiww weview da wequest and send uu quotation on Tewegwam.
messages.bookingApp.result.title: Eww…
messages.bookingApp.result.content: You might haz taken da joke too sewiouswy. But if uu awe weawwy bowed, uu feew fwee to come {link}.
